inline_comments.message:
Since this is a dcae specific image, it (and also tlsRepository) should not be under global.
Those are regular chart configurations.
Other projects may also have tls images, I assume you wouldn't like them to override your image globally.

We used this same approach in Dublin in the dcae-bootstrap, dcae-deployment-handler, and dcae-policy-handler charts.
We do expect (or at least hope) that eventually TLS certificate setup will be done by an ONAP-wide image that would be specified through a global value.
If we need to change this to a non-global value, we will need to change the three charts we delivered in Dublin as well.  Is this necessary?
